package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_executes_raw_sql_inline: Handlers that execute literal SQL or repository-unaware raw queries.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule044NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule044NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule044NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario044Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule044NegativeService, input Rule044NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
